title: SMG OP2 register information
summary: Owner-supplied OP2 register list: output2 apparent power 239 (signed), active power 240, load percent 243, voltage 244 scaled by 0.1, cut-off SOC 344, overload warning threshold 353, output2 enable at register 354 bit 0 with write-multiple, and remote switch at register 420 bit 0.
